name: Millbrook
descriptionSeed: A riverside farming village on the valley floor, home to a few hundred unaligned folk — Traditionalists, Adaptors, and a handful of Explorers living side by side. Water wheels turn along the Echo River; terraced gardens climb the lower slopes. The village well and the river dock are the two centers of daily life. Lately the water runs faintly gray-green some mornings, and everyone pretends not to notice out loud.
encounterFlavor: Daily village life under quiet strain — farmers arguing about irrigation shares, children playing at sonic and light games they barely control, traders passing through with news.
questSeeds: Mara Wells is quietly testing newcomers for competence — running her errands leads into the contamination mystery and, eventually, the question of her successor
The irrigation-share dispute between two farming families is one bad harvest from a feud; someone level-headed could broker terms
Kit Farrow wants backing for an expedition through the new pass before winter — supplies, allies, and someone to convince the elders
A child who plays sonic games by the docks has started hearing 'a second river under the river' — nobody takes her seriously
axisVectorNote: Derived from authored poleIntensity against world_node_atlas.axisOrder (SNG-180). Disposition — what this place IS. Distinct from world position.
worldPosNote: Ordinary valley farmland, leaning life. Erik's home ground in play. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
